title: Platform primitive deploy (UI verify)
description: Domain-agnostic fixture: tree + dashboard + operator UI via deploy playbook (no vertical BFF).
prompt: Deploy the platform-primitive example bundle and open its operator overview. Confirm hub device and overview dashboard exist in Explorer.
uiJourney: AI Studio Bundle / Solutions → Deploy → Explorer → Operator
humanSteps: Deploy platform-primitive from Solutions or AI Studio Bundle tab.
In Explorer confirm platform-primitive-hub and platform-primitive-overview.
Open Operator overview for the app.
